items.descriptionZh: 见到老师说早上好，用微笑开始幼儿园的一天。
items.descriptionEn: Say good morning to your teacher and start the school day with a smile.

items.descriptionZh: 看一看名字或小标记，找到自己的小座位。
items.descriptionEn: Look for your name or picture mark to find your own seat.
items.example: 我的座位在小星星旁边。

items.descriptionZh: 进教室后，把书包放到自己的位置。
items.descriptionEn: After entering the classroom, put your bag in your own spot.

items.descriptionZh: 口渴时找到自己的水杯，排队接水。
items.descriptionEn: When thirsty, find your cup and line up for water.

items.descriptionZh: 想上厕所时告诉老师，排队等待，不着急。
items.descriptionEn: Tell your teacher when you need the bathroom and wait calmly in line.

items.descriptionZh: 玩完以后，把玩具送回原来的家。
items.descriptionEn: After playing, put toys back where they belong.

items.descriptionZh: 午睡时轻声轻步，让身体休息一下。
items.descriptionEn: At nap time, use a quiet voice and let your body rest.

items.descriptionZh: 拉不上拉链、打不开盒子时，可以请老师帮忙。
items.descriptionEn: When a zipper or box is hard, you can ask your teacher for help.

items.pinyin: hé péng you dǎ zhāo hu
items.descriptionZh: 想和朋友一起玩，可以先说你好。
items.descriptionEn: When you want to play with a friend, start by saying hello.

items.pinyin: tīng dào míng zi huí yìng
items.descriptionZh: 老师叫到名字时，可以说：到！
items.descriptionEn: When your teacher calls your name, you can answer: Here!

items.descriptionZh: 放学时跟着老师等家人，不自己跑开。
items.descriptionEn: At pickup time, stay with your teacher and wait for your family.
items.example: 我和老师一起等爸爸妈妈。

items.descriptionZh: 用完水彩笔、剪刀和图书，放回固定位置。
items.descriptionEn: After using markers, scissors, or books, put them back in their place.
